title: Sky's Overworld Quartz
description: This mod adds a new way of obtaining Quartz without going into the Nether!
body:
![information](https://i.imgur.com/fkueT8e.png)

▪ This mod adds Quartz ore to the Overworld! It's very common and when mined drops Quartz Fragments. You will need 4 of these Fragments to craft one Nether Quartz, or you can be lucky and get one directly with a 30% chance from the ore! You can also get more when mining the ore using the Fortune enchant!

- YOU MAY NOT redistribute this mod on other websites.
